name: Swedish Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the ground turkey, bread crumbs, garlic salt, pepper, nutmeg and egg. Mix until well blended.
2. Shape into meatballs.
3. In a frying pan, brown all sides of the meatballs in hot olive oil.
4. Remove the meatballs from the pan.
5. Stir the flour into the drippings; cook over low heat until the flour browns.
6. Add water and beef bouillon cubes to the pan.
7. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
8. Reduce the heat. Return the meatballs to the pan. Cover and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes.
